name: ripvec
description: Semantic code search + multi-language LSP + knowledge-graph skill index. 21 grammars, 26 extensions, function-level PageRank, hybrid BM25+vector ranking. Model2Vec static encoder + TinyBERT cross-encoder reranker, CPU-only. 4.1.14: up_to_date MCP tool rebuilt for plugin-install users — always returns version + binary_path + install_kind (plugin/source/unknown heuristic); adds GitHub Releases API check so plugin users see `release_stale=true` + upgrade_hint when a newer binary is available; status field unified (`up_to_date` / `release_available` / `source_newer_than_binary`). 4.1.13: fix MCP project-root default — honors CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR before current_dir fallback. 4.1.12: focus-PageRank recalibrated (α 0.15 → 0.35). 4.1.10: knowledge-graph skill index. 4.1.0: find_dead_code MCP tool. 4.0: LSP-shaped composability.
